title: Aundha Nagnath Temple
tagline: Aundha Nagnath Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Aundha Nagnath Temple is an ancient Shiva temple located at Aundha Nagnath in the Hingoli district of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Aundha Nagnath Temple is an ancient Shiva temple located at Aundha Nagnath in the Hingoli district of Maharashtra, India. It is considered to be the eighth of the twelve Jyotirlinga shrines dedicated to Lord Shiva. The temple is a significant historical heritage site, representing a confluence of history, architecture, faith, and culture. The temple's history is linked to various significant periods, from the Pandavas of the Mahabharata to the Yadavas of Devagiri and later Ahilyabai Holkar.

topPlaces.name: Aundha Nagnath
topPlaces.description: Aundha Naganath is a town in Hingoli district of Maharashtra State in India. The town is known for the Aundha Nagnath Temple, a Hindu temple.

topPlaces.name: Indian Initiative in Gravitational-wave Observations
topPlaces.description: INDIGO or IndIGO (Indian Initiative in Gravitational-wave Observations) is a consortium of Indian gravitational wave physicists. It is an initiative to set up advanced experimental facilities for a multi-institutional observatory project in gravitational-wave astronomy to be located near Aundha Nagnath, Hingoli District, Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Jawala Bazar, Hingoli
topPlaces.description: Jawala Bazar is a major town in Aundha Nagnath tehsil of Hingoli district in Maharashtra state of India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Aundha Nagnath Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Aundha Nagnath Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Aundha Nagnath Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (49 km) and the nearest railway station is Aurangabad Railway Station (184 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Aundha Nagnath Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Aundha Nagnath Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Aundha Nagnath Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Aundha Nagnath Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Aundha Nagnath Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Aundha Nagnath, Indian Initiative in Gravitational-wave Observations, Jawala Bazar, Hingoli.
